## Summary

- 

## Maintainer Workflow Impact

- [ ] PR review support
- [ ] Issue triage
- [ ] Release workflow
- [ ] Security or policy checks
- [ ] Documentation only

## Safety

- [ ] No new GitHub App permissions
- [ ] No raw repository content persistence
- [ ] No external AI transfer without explicit policy opt-in
- [ ] Write actions remain dry-run or approval-gated
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes are called out for maintainer review

## Release and Data Impact

- [ ] No database schema or retention changes
- [ ] No release, package, SBOM, or provenance workflow changes
- [ ] No generated evidence exports or local environment files committed

## Verification

```sh
npm run check
```
